name: Vermont
why_ruby_pro: Vermont Department of Liquor and Lottery compliance embedded in every distributor workflow
Excise tax calculations under VSA Title 7 applied automatically on every transaction
Control-state spirits coordination with the DLL agency store network managed seamlessly
problem: DLL reporting assembled by hand from disconnected spreadsheets and paper invoices
Vermont Title 7 excise tax calculations create error risk across every invoice
Coordinating delivery schedules around DLL agency store constraints slows fulfillment
difference: Auto-calculate Vermont excise on beer, wine, and spirits at the line-item level
DLL compliance reports generated directly from live transaction and inventory data
Route visibility across Vermont's rural and mountain distribution territories
how_it_works: Every order tagged with Title 7 excise rates and DLL license requirements automatically
One-click DLL compliance reports pulled from actual sales and inventory records
See account health and route profitability across all Vermont territories in real time
